[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / resetMatrix

# Method: resetMatrix()

```ts
resetMatrix(): void;
```

Reset the current model transform to identity.

This clears translation, rotation, and scale state for subsequent draw calls.

## Returns

`void`

## Example
